query: I just pushed the new pricing page to staging at localhost:3000/pricing — can you take a look at it and tell me if the layout matches the figma? the cards should be 3 across on desktop with equal height. use agent-vision to check

i need to fill out this long onboarding form in our app — there are like 12 fields across 3 steps. the data is in /tmp/user-data.json. can you just do it for me? the form is open in safari right now
the ios simulator is running my expo app. can you scroll through the home feed screen and take screenshots of each section? i want to see how the cards render with real data before the demo tomorrow
I’m working on a CSS animation for a button hover state — can you watch the browser while I hover over the button and tell me if the transition looks smooth or if it jitters? take a few screenshots
look at my screen — i have mail.app open and i need to find the email from sarah@acme.co about the contract renewal, open it, and download the PDF attachment
can you visually compare the before and after of my header component? I changed the font weight from 500 to 600 and the padding from 16px to 20px. the browser is open with hot reload

take a screenshot of what’s on my screen right now — i want to capture the current state of the dashboard before i start refactoring the chart component
check the UI of my app — i just changed the dark mode colors and something looks off with the sidebar contrast. the app is running at localhost:5173 and i have it open in firefox
write playwright e2e tests for our checkout flow — it should test the cart page, payment form, and confirmation. we use stripe test cards. here’s the test file at tests/checkout.spec.ts
i have this scanned pdf of an old receipt at ~/Documents/receipt-2024.pdf — can you extract the line items and total into a csv? the text is a bit blurry but should be readable

audit the accessibility of my React components — check for missing aria labels, keyboard navigation issues, and color contrast ratios in src/components/. don’t look at the screen, just review the code
generate a wireframe mockup for a new dashboard layout — i want a sidebar nav, main content area with 4 KPI cards, and a data table below. output as svg or html
i’ve got two png screenshots in /tmp (old-design.png and new-design.png) from last week’s PR — can you diff them and tell me what visual changes were made?
build a puppeteer script that takes screenshots of our marketing site at different breakpoints (320, 768, 1024, 1440) for responsive testing. save them to ./screenshots/
i need to add a screenshot capture feature to our electron app — the user clicks a button and it saves the current window to disk. look at src/main.ts for the existing ipc handlers
set up cypress component testing for our design system — i want visual regression tests that compare rendered components against baseline snapshots in cypress/snapshots/
review my tailwind config and suggest improvements to the color scale — i think the grays are too warm and the primary blue doesn’t have enough contrast with the background
help me configure the macos screen recording api in swift — i want to build something like agent-vision that captures a region of the screen programmatically
